title: Supply Chain Manager - Flipkart Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Flipkart Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Flipkart Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Flipkart Logistics:
Flipkart Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
